response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified Song 1 via lyrics 'ほら気付けば手を握っている' as 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai. 
2. Identified Song 2 via on-screen text '会いにKITE!' and composer 'Medansy' as '会いにKiTE!' by iLiFE!. 
3. Performed targeted web searches for both songs' original and English lyrics. 
4. Compiled the scene data based on visual transitions and song change points.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two song performances by Hololive VTubers in a karaoke room setting. The first song is 'Mela!' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai, and the second is '会いにKiTE!' (Aini KiTE!) by iLiFE!.

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform 'Mela!' in a karaoke room. Song lyrics appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 今なんじゃない？ / メラメラとたぎれ / 眠っているだけの正義 / こんな僕も君のヒーローになりたいのさ / かっこいい君には / 僕じゃ頼りないのかなんて / そりゃそうだよな / だって今もこうして迷ってる / 手を取ってくれないか / ギブとテイクさ / 君が僕のヒーローだったように
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Why not now? / Burn and rage, the justice just sleeping / I want to be your hero too / For a cool person like you, am I not reliable? / Well, that's true, because I'm still hesitating like this / Won't you take my hand? / Like you were my hero, give and take

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform '会いにKiTE!' (Aini KiTE!). Song title and composer (Medansy) are displayed.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 君に会いたい! (ハイ!) / ねぇ会いたい! (ハイ!) / ねぇ会いたい! (Oh-FuFu) / 今すぐiにKITE! / I! L! I! F! E! / 私と貴方で作るアイドルライフ / 心も体も飛び跳ねる / 君も今日からアイライファー
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I want to see you! (Hi!) / Hey, I want to see you! (Hi!) / Hey, I want to see you! (Oh-FuFu) / Come to me right now! / I! L! I! F! E! / With you, I will build an idol life! / My heart and body are jumping / From today, you are also an idol lifer!
